Primary.$description: Page canvas - the default app surface. → White/1000

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover on the page canvas (rows, list items). → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Secondary.$description: First raised surface - cards and panels. → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the card surface. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Tertiary.$description: Second surface level - wells, table stripes, insets. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the inset surface. → Grey/300 · ≈ Silver

Inverse.$description: Inverted page surface - near-black base for dark sections in light mode. Pair with Text/Icon *-Inverse. → Grey/900

Inverse-Hover.$description: Hover on the inverted surface - lightens one step toward contrast. → Grey/800

Primary.$description: Solid neutral fill - secondary buttons, chips, toggle-off. → Grey/700 · = Outer Space

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the solid neutral fill. → Grey/800 · ≈ Black

Secondary.$description: Light neutral fill - subtle chips, pills, table headers. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the light neutral fill. → Grey/300 · ≈ Silver

Tertiary.$description: Faintest neutral fill - quiet backgrounds. → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint neutral fill. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Primary.$description: Magenta brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Magenta/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the magenta brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Magenta/400

Secondary.$description: Magenta tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Magenta/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the magenta tint. → Magenta/300 · = Heliotrope Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest magenta tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Magenta/100 · = Heliotrope Light

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint magenta tint. → Magenta/200

Strong.$description: Deep brand surface - dark magenta section (hero, footer, banner), 2 steps past Primary. White foreground. → Magenta/700

Strong-Hover.$description: Hover on the deep brand surface - darkens one more step. → Magenta/800

Primary.$description: Coral brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Coral/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the coral brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Coral/400 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Secondary.$description: Coral tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the coral tint. → Coral/300 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest coral tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Coral/100 · = Chablis

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint coral tint. → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Strong.$description: Deep brand surface - dark coral section (hero, footer, banner), 2 steps past Primary. White foreground. → Coral/700

Strong-Hover.$description: Hover on the deep brand surface - darkens one more step. → Coral/800

Primary.$description: Green brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Green/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the green brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Green/400

Secondary.$description: Green tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Green/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the green tint. → Green/300

Tertiary.$description: Faintest green tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Green/100 · = White Ice

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint green tint. → Green/200

Strong.$description: Deep brand surface - dark green section (hero, footer, banner), 2 steps past Primary. White foreground. → Green/700

Strong-Hover.$description: Hover on the deep brand surface - darkens one more step. → Green/800

Primary.$description: Orange brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Orange/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the orange brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Orange/400 · ≈ Orange Mid

Secondary.$description: Orange tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the orange tint. → Orange/300 · ≈ Orange Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest orange tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Orange/100 · = Orange Light

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint orange tint. → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Strong.$description: Deep brand surface - dark orange section (hero, footer, banner), 2 steps past Primary. White foreground. → Orange/700

Strong-Hover.$description: Hover on the deep brand surface - darkens one more step. → Orange/800

Primary.$description: Blue brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the blue brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Blue/600

Secondary.$description: Blue tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Blue/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the blue tint. → Blue/300

Tertiary.$description: Faintest blue tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Blue/100 · ≈ Patterns Blue

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint blue tint. → Blue/200

Strong.$description: Deep brand surface - dark blue section (hero, footer, banner), 2 steps past Primary. White foreground. → Blue/700

Strong-Hover.$description: Hover on the deep brand surface - darkens one more step. → Blue/800

Bold.$description: Solid success fill - positive results, confirmations. Banners, badges, toasts. → Green/500 · Main

Light.$description: Success tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Green/100 · = White Ice

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold success fills — follows the hover law. → Green/400

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light success tints (one step darker). → Green/200

Bold.$description: Solid warning fill - caution, attention needed. Banners, badges, toasts. → Orange/500 · Main

Light.$description: Warning tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Orange/100 · = Orange Light

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold warning fills — follows the hover law. → Orange/400 · ≈ Orange Mid

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light warning tints (one step darker). → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Bold.$description: Solid danger fill - errors, destructive actions. Banners, badges, toasts. → Coral/500 · Main

Light.$description: Danger tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Coral/100 · = Chablis

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold danger fills — follows the hover law. → Coral/400 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light danger tints (one step darker). → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Primary.$description: Fill for disabled controls. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Bold.$description: Solid info fill - neutral information. Banners, badges, toasts. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Light.$description: Info tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Blue/100 · ≈ Patterns Blue

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold info fills — follows the hover law. → Blue/600

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light info tints (one step darker). → Blue/200

Inverse.$description: Light overlay on dark imagery/video; inverse of Overlay/Default. → White/300

Default.$description: Blocking layer under modals; also darkens photos for text (black 70%). → Black/500
Frosted translucent surface (bars, menus over scroll) - pair with Blur/400 background blur. → White/700

Inverse.$description: Dark glass plate over media - player controls, badges on imagery; pair with Blur/* when frosted. → Black/400

Default.$description: Selected item background - active menu row, chosen date, highlighted table row. → Violet/100 · = Magnolia

Primary.$description: Yellow brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Yellow/500 · Main

Primary.$description: Main text on light surfaces. → Grey/900 · = Near-black

Secondary.$description: Muted text - captions, meta, labels (6:1). → Grey/600 · ≈ Jumbo

Tertiary.$description: Decorative text ONLY (2.8:1) - never hints or placeholders, those use Secondary. → Grey/400

Primary-Inverse.$description: Inverse of Default/Primary — white text on dark / inverse / neutral-solid surfaces (was Text/On-Neutral). → White/1000

Primary.$description: Magenta accent text on light surfaces. → Magenta/700 · ≈ Heliotrope Dark

Secondary.$description: Muted magenta text on light surfaces — softer/secondary brand emphasis (large text & accents, not body). → Magenta/600

Primary.$description: Quiet hairline - dividers, quiet cards. Decorative (exempt from 3:1). → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Secondary.$description: Functional border - inputs, selects. Meets 3:1 on light surfaces. Hover state: step up to Tertiary. → Grey/500 · ≈ Jumbo

Tertiary.$description: Strong border - input hover/active, emphasised frames. → Grey/700 · = Outer Space

Default.$description: Keyboard focus ring on light surfaces. → Violet/600 · ≈ Daisy Bush

On-Fill.$description: Focus ring sitting on bright/brand fills. → Grey/900 · = Near-black

Primary.$description: Readable magenta border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Magenta/700 · ≈ Heliotrope Dark

6.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Magenta/500 · Main

Whatsapp.$description: WhatsApp vendor brand constant - share buttons. Foreground white per vendor guidelines. External colour: exempt from our ramps and contract.

Telegram.$description: Telegram vendor brand constant (flat mid of official 2AABEE-229ED9 gradient) - share buttons. Foreground white. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Facebook.$description: Facebook vendor brand constant - share/login buttons. Foreground white per vendor guidelines. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Vk.$description: VK vendor brand constant (2021+ blue) - share/login buttons. Foreground white. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Messenger.$description: Facebook Messenger vendor brand constant - share buttons. Foreground white per vendor guidelines. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

X.$description: X (formerly Twitter) vendor brand constant (2023 rebrand black) - share buttons. Foreground white. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Viber.$description: Viber vendor brand constant - share buttons. Foreground white per vendor guidelines. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Line.$description: LINE vendor brand constant (2020+ green) - share buttons. Foreground white per vendor guidelines. External: exempt from ramps/contract.

Kakaotalk.$description: KakaoTalk vendor brand constant (Kakao yellow) - share buttons. Foreground near-black #3C1E1E per vendor guidelines (NOT white). External: exempt from ramps/contract.

300.$description: Black at 20% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/300

400.$description: Black at 40% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/400

500.$description: Black at 70% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/500

600.$description: Black at 80% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/600

700.$description: Black at 85% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/700

800.$description: Black at 90% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/800

900.$description: Black at 95% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/900

1000.$description: Black at 100% alpha - transparency utility (scrims, dividers, borders, hovers) over any surface. → Black/1000

Brand-Spark.$description: Hero duotone of the two brand mains - primary banners, big CTAs. White text.

Deep-Space.$description: Dark hero - headers, footers, premium blocks. White text, pairs with Frosted/Inverse.

Sunrise.$description: Warm promo duotone - marketing pops, celebration banners. Dark text (hue/900).

Mango.$description: Energetic accent - streaks, rewards, gamification. Dark text.

Lagoon.$description: Fresh duotone - progress and success heroes. White text on the blue end only - prefer large type.

Berry.$description: Saturated duotone - bold editorial blocks. White text.

Aurora.$description: Aurora tri-stop with uneven stops (2026 trend) - hero backgrounds; pair with grain/blur overlay. White text near the violet end.

Mint-Air.$description: Ultra-subtle light wash - section backgrounds, cards. Dark text.

Canvas-Wash.$description: Barely-there page wash (ultra-subtle trend) - page tops, empty states. Dark text.

Night-Glow.$description: Dark premium glow - pricing, pro features; pair with Backdrop/Glass plates. White text.

0.$description: No rounding — sharp corners (0px). The explicit 'none' radius, mirrors Space/0 · Depth/0. → 0

050.$description: Fine rounding (2px) — small chips, tags, inputs, badges, social tiles. → 2

150.$description: Small rounding (6px) — compact buttons, dense controls, small cards. → 6

Border.$description: Default hairline for inputs, cards, dividers (1px).

Small.$description: Icon box 24px - dense UI - list rows, inline chips.

Medium.$description: Icon box 32px - the default - buttons, nav, inputs.

Large.$description: Icon box 40px - hero spots, feature tiles, empty states.

100.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (4px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

200.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (8px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

300.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (12px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

400.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (16px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

500.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (24px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

600.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (32px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

700.$description: Shadow geometry: blur radius (36px) used by the Drop-Shadow styles. Not a layout value.

0.$description: Shadow geometry: zero offset - ambient layers and spread-only shadows. Not a layout value.

100.$description: Shadow geometry: vertical offset (4px) for the Drop-Shadow styles - deeper = further. Not a layout value.

200.$description: Shadow geometry: vertical offset (8px) for the Drop-Shadow styles - deeper = further. Not a layout value.

300.$description: Shadow geometry: vertical offset (12px) for the Drop-Shadow styles - deeper = further. Not a layout value.

400.$description: Shadow geometry: vertical offset (16px) for the Drop-Shadow styles - deeper = further. Not a layout value.

025.$description: Shadow geometry: vertical offset (1px) for the Drop-Shadow styles - deeper = further. Not a layout value.

Ring.$description: Width of the focus ring itself (CSS outline-width).

Offset.$description: GAP between element edge and focus ring (CSS outline-offset) — spacing, not a stroke. Not applicable inside Figma.

Xs.$description: Display Xs (36px / 100%) - big numbers, stat callouts.

Lg-Regular.$description: Heading Lg Regular (32px / 130%) — lighter section titles, editorial headings.

Md-Regular.$description: Heading Md Regular (24px / 130%) — lighter section titles, editorial headings.

Sm-Regular.$description: Heading Sm Regular (20px / 130%) — lighter section titles, editorial headings.

Xs-Regular.$description: Heading Xs Regular (16px / 130%) — lighter section titles, editorial headings.

Md.$description: Body Md (16px / 140%) - the default reading size.

Sm.$description: Body Sm (14px / 140%) - secondary copy, table cells.

Md-Strong.$description: Body Md-Strong (16px / 140%) - inline emphasis in body copy.

Lg.$description: Label Lg (16px / 100%) - buttons, inputs, tabs (single-line UI).

Sm.$description: Label Sm (14px / 100%) - compact controls, badges (single-line UI).

Default.$description: Caption Default (12px / 140%) - helper text, timestamps, meta.
Overline Default (10px / 150%) - eyebrow labels - uppercase tracking.

100.$description: Subtle lift - hairline cards, hover hints. Single soft layer.

600.$description: Maximum elevation - dialogs and sheets over the scrim. Single deep layer.

100.$description: Subtle inset - wells, recessed fields, embedded media.

200.$description: Pressed state - buttons and toggles while active.

Overlay.$description: Backdrop blur for overlays - pair with Background/Overlay/*.

Scrim.$description: Backdrop blur for scrims behind modals.

Heavy.$description: Heaviest backdrop blur - hero media, Background/Frosted/Inverse.

Disabled.$description: Layer opacity for disabled elements - percent (Figma binds it as 40%); code gets 0.4.

Muted.$description: Layer opacity for de-emphasised elements - percent (60%); code gets 0.6.

0.$description: Opacity scale step (0%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

10.$description: Opacity scale step (10%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

20.$description: Opacity scale step (20%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

30.$description: Opacity scale step (30%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

40.$description: Opacity scale step (40%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

50.$description: Opacity scale step (50%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

60.$description: Opacity scale step (60%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

70.$description: Opacity scale step (70%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

80.$description: Opacity scale step (80%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

90.$description: Opacity scale step (90%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.

100.$description: Opacity scale step (100%). Prefer the roles (Disabled 40 / Muted 60); if you bind one scale value repeatedly - promote it to a named role.
